## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] ci — pipeline / workflow change
- [ ] chore / refactor / test

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue / workstream
- [ ] Focused, single-purpose change
- [ ] Docs updated (README / implementation plan) if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Lints pass where applicable (`shellcheck`, `yamllint`)
- [ ] Commit title follows Conventional Commits
